n: An Audience with the Boy King

steps.t: Tuhâl is travelling to Dale to meet with Queen Erna and King Bard. You should meet Tuhâl in Dale.
Queen Erna and King Bard can be found in Dale. You should talk to Queen Erna.
Queen Erna and King Bard can be found in Dale. You should talk to Queen Erna.
The King has decided to set aside land for the Easterling refugees! You should discuss the good news with Tuhâl!
